We flew in from Seattle to hear you play and also came to your meet and greet afterwards. Gabe is visually impaired and has been so inspired by your music and composition. Because of his vision impairment, is it possible to request seats near the front so that he can be as close as possible?  I will also reach out to you privately - I think I still have your email address.  Thanks so much!  I am surprising him with these tickets for Christmas!  Beth Heintz
